title: Interlocking Fish Tessellation Coloring Page
seoTitle: Medium Interlocking Fish Tessellation Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this medium interlocking fish tessellation coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Tessellations and geometric grids are repeating patterns that fit together perfectly with no gaps.
Coloring repetitive lines acts as a form of meditation, lowering heart rates and encouraging focus.
Repeating designs are excellent for practicing color schemes, shading, and gradients.
